chunks.text: HERMES Quota | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar HERMES Quota HERMES, the EECS Windows general login server is being configured with quotas on Wednesday, June 29th. The quota limit will be 500MB and will app

e 29th. The quota limit will be 500MB and will apply to C:\Documents and Settings\user. This is the default users profile location and the only directory users can write to on HERMES. When a user profile reaches 250MB a reminder will be sent to the u

ile reaches 250MB a reminder will be sent to the user that the profiles is approaching the 500MB limit. When a user reaches the 500MB limit, no more data storage will be allowed. This is a fixed quota. IDSG recommends users save files in their home d

. IDSG recommends users save files in their home directories and not on the local C:\ drive of HERMES as HERMES is not being backed up. In the event of data loss, no restoration effort will be made. UPDATE [2005-06-29 16:55:04 | Wendy Hargle] The wor

PDATE [2005-06-29 16:55:04 | Wendy Hargle] The work is done and Hermes is back up. UPDATE [2005-06-21 14:23:07 | Wendy Hargle] Hermes will be down on June 29th from 3:00 to 5:00 PM for the quota configuration. Please plan accordingly. UPDATE [2005-06

guration. Please plan accordingly. UPDATE [2005-06-28 16:59:59 | Wendy Hargle, IDSG Staff] This is a reminder that HERMES will be down TOMORROW, June 29th 3:00 PM – 5:00 PM . Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Sched
